title: agrostis alba var. tenuis
intro: Agrostis alba var. tenuis, also known as bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. tenuis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, Agrostis alba var. tenuis has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used topically as a poultice or compress.
